summary: Check errors returned by http.NewRequestWithContext instead of discarding them.
reason: Four sites used `req, _ := http.NewRequestWithContext(...)`, leaving req=nil on URL parse failure. The following Header.Set or Do(req) call would then panic. While the URLs are built from typed integers plus a constant base URL making failure unlikely in practice, the docID path in tnFetchDocumentText takes a server-supplied string that could theoretically produce an invalid URL.
